text: I stand quietly in this modern, well-lit corridor, peering through glass into a space emblazoned with words like 'R + D'. The air hints at innovation and promise, yet the sterile order of the environment evokes a curious distance. As I approach the vibrant display, my mind turns to the human pursuit of progress—how we gather knowledge, shape it, and release it anew. Surrounded by carefully curated technology and ideas, I feel both dwarfed and energized by the ceaseless tide of research and invention. There is a subtle awe in witnessing this collective striving toward the future, tinged with wonder at how we might shape the unknown together.
